holdings.infoBox: VIG is an equity ETF with a total of 341 individual holdings. The top holdings are Broadcom stock at 5.39%, Apple at 4.55%, Microsoft at 4.26%, Eli Lilly and Company at 3.83%, and JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 3.31%.

overview.description: The Vanguard Dividend Appreciation ETF (VIG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P U.S. Dividend Growers index, a market-cap-weighted index of US companies that have increased their annual dividends for 10 or more consecutive years. VIG was launched on Apr 21, 2006 and is issued by Vanguard.
